1.text: My kids love the coloring pages I create for them! So easy to use and they keep asking for more!
1.author: Sarah T., Mom of three

2.text: I've been using this for my kindergarten class. The children are thrilled with their personalized coloring activities!
2.author: Mark L., Kindergarten Teacher

3.text: The advanced mode lets me create exactly what I need for my art therapy sessions. The quality is impressive.
3.author: Dr. Jessica P., Art Therapist

cta.title: Ready to Create Amazing Coloring Pages?

create.title: Create Your Perfect Coloring Page
create.subtitle: It's easy! Describe what you want, choose a style, and our AI will do the rest

tips.title: Tips for Best Results
tips.1: Be specific with details (example: 'a smiling cartoon elephant playing with a red ball in a garden with flowers')
tips.2: Include the setting or background in your description (forest, space, underwater, etc.)
tips.3: Mention the style you prefer (cartoon, realistic, simple, detailed)
tips.4: For toddlers and young children, choose 'Simple' style for bigger coloring areas

photo.title: Convert Photo to Coloring Page
photo.description: This feature is coming soon! Upload and convert your photos into coloring pages.

draw.title: Draw & Enhance
draw.description: Coming soon! Draw a basic sketch and let our AI enhance it into a beautiful coloring page.

create.promptLabel: What would you like to create?
create.promptHelp: Describe what you want in your coloring page with specific details
create.promptPlaceholder: e.g., A friendly cartoon elephant playing with a ball in a sunny garden
create.styleHelp: Simple styles are best for young children, complex styles for older kids and adults

advancedMode.helpText: For advanced users who want complete control

errors.emptyPrompt: Please describe what you'd like to color
errors.tooLong: Description is too long. Please keep it shorter
errors.generationFailed: We couldn't create that image. Please try different words or a simpler description.
errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save your coloring page. Please try again in a moment.

success.generated: Your coloring page is ready! You can print it, download it, or create another one.
success.saved: Great! Your coloring page has been saved to your collection.

about.title: About Our Coloring Page Creator
about.subtitle: We're making coloring fun and accessible for everyone
about.missionText: We believe coloring reduces stress and boosts creativity for all ages. Our mission is to make it easy for anyone to create personalized, high-quality coloring pages without any design skills.
about.technologyText: We use advanced AI specifically trained to create beautiful coloring pages. Our system understands your description and creates crisp, clean outlines perfect for coloring with any medium.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist.

serverError.title: Server Error
serverError.message: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
